description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing git via apt, uses the julia Docker image for all jobs, and relies on the default test stage. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes julia -e "using Pkg; Pkg.add(\"Documenter\")" then julia --project=./ -e "using Pkg; Pkg.build(); include(\"docs/make.jl\")" and moves docs/build to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact. Add a test job that runs julia --project=./ -e "using Pkg; Pkg.activate(); Pkg.instantiate(); Pkg.test()". Ensure the pages job defines artifacts paths public.
